description_long: This is a medieval-style helmet constructed primarily from hammered metal, featuring a rounded dome shape reinforced with prominent gold-colored metal bands running vertically and horizontally across its surface. The helmet's exterior is mottled with patches of reddish-brown discoloration, suggesting rust or battle wear, and is studded with small, evenly spaced rivets along the lower rim. The lower edge of the helmet is bordered by a thick, gold-toned band, and it includes attached cheek guards made of dark, riveted material for additional facial protection. The interior appears hollow, designed to fit over a human head, with visible attachment points for the cheek guards. The overall finish is rough and aged, giving the helmet an authentic, historical appearance suitable for display or reenactment.
description: A medieval-style, dome-shaped metal helmet with gold-colored reinforcement bands, rivets, and attached cheek guards, showing signs of rust and wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central gold band running vertically over the dome and the symmetrical cheek guards on either side.
description_view_1: Left-front angled view highlights the hammered texture, rivets, and the attachment of the cheek guard.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizes the rounded dome and intersecting gold bands, with less visibility of the cheek guards.
description_view_3: Right-front angled view mirrors the left, showing the cheek guard and rivet pattern, with more of the helmet's curvature visible.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: A single row of small, round ventilation holes encircles the lower part of the dome, evenly spaced just above the rim.

license_info.creator_display_name: 方浩驊 台藝大視傳
